# ClickhousePolarsIOManager

Polars variant of clickhouse_io_manager. Same backend (ClickHouse) but with the Polars query engine — much faster on wide rows. Wraps the official `dagster-clickhouse-polars` package.

Wraps the official `dagster-clickhouse-polars` package.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `host` | `str` | ClickHouse host. |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `resource_key` | `str` | `"io_manager"` | Dagster resource key. |
| `port` | `int` | `8443` | ClickHouse port. |
| `username_env_var` | `str` | `"CLICKHOUSE_USER"` | Env var with username. |
| `password_env_var` | `str` | `"CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD"` | Env var with password. |
| `database` | `str` | `"default"` | ClickHouse database. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `secure` | `bool` | `true` | Use HTTPS. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example

```yaml
type: dagster_component_templates.ClickhousePolarsIOManagerComponent
attributes:
  resource_key: <fill in>
  host: <fill in>
  port: <fill in>
  username_env_var: <fill in>
  password_env_var: <fill in>
  database: <fill in>
  secure: <fill in>
```

## Requirements

```
dagster
dagster-clickhouse-polars
polars
```
